---
title: "Table 1: Minority Students at Universities"
output: html_document
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(kableExtra)

data <- data.frame(
  Demographic_Group = c("Asian/Pacific Share", "Black Share", "Hispanic Share", "Non-resident Alien Share"),
  Min = c(0.00000, 0.00000, 0.00000, 0.00000),
  `1st_Qu.` = c(0.00671, 0.02796, 0.01165, 0.00131),
  Median = c(0.01497, 0.06364, 0.02673, 0.00987),
  Mean = c(0.03390, 0.13037, 0.07425, 0.02039),
  `3rd_Qu.` = c(0.03518, 0.15214, 0.07482, 0.02673),
  Max = c(0.79159, 1.00000, 0.96418, 0.41468),
  NA_s = c(50, 50, 50, 50)
)

kable(data, "html") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(2:8, width = "100px") %>%
  add_header_above(c(" ", "Descriptive Statistics" = 6, " ")) %>%
  add_footnote(c("Note: NA_s represents the number of missing values."))

#used notes from poli 30 to create rmarkdown that would create table 1
